policy: All UI icons, fonts and the MediaPipe runtime are local. Before build, the official Google HandLandmarker task is downloaded once, checksum-verified and copied to public/vendor/models. No runtime hand-model download is permitted.
note: Kurdish UI uses local Noto Kufi Arabic. Smart Shape 2.0, Workspace Navigator, Loading Experience, Performance Guard, exact video-overlay Hand Calibration and GPU-first local hand tracking run locally in the browser.

interfaceIconSystem.method: Semantic CSS mask classes backed by local SVG assets

releaseStatus: v5.2.1 removes the FPS, Online and CAM status backgrounds while retaining camera-safe readable overlay text.
